scope: Public editorial works and planned records for the RICE search and route-integrity checks.

publication_states.sample: Complete editorial sample; readable but not part of a released issue.
publication_states.planned: Proposed work with no public destination.
publication_states.withdrawn: Removed from public display; retained only for audit history.

field_notes: Every work declares publication_state, season, is_sample, nullable href, hero, and disclosure. Planned and withdrawn records must not link.

categories.description: Photo essays or standalone photographic work.
Archival records, documents, field evidence, and clearly labeled reconstructions.

articles.title: Crowley Modernism
articles.author: C. Sandbatch
articles.description: Rice, oil, levees, and a modernism assembled from pumps, invoices, and wet heat.
articles.disclosure: Editorial sample; not part of a released issue.

articles.title: Against Cotton Memory
articles.description: A proposed refusal of the South as soft-focus inheritance and decorative ruin.

articles.title: The Pump House
articles.author: L. Doucet
articles.description: A machine runs through the night while the water keeps its own account.
articles.disclosure: Editorial sample; not part of a released issue.

articles.title: Twenty-Six Hours of Fluorescent Light
articles.description: A proposed story of a convenience store, tropical weather, and debt.

articles.title: Crawfish Pond with Saints
articles.author: C. Sandbatch
articles.description: Eight lines filed between a pump house, a trap line, and a hymn.
articles.disclosure: Editorial sample; not part of a released issue.

articles.title: Three Rice Songs
articles.description: A proposed sequence for water, machinery, and voices carried across a field.

articles.title: Field at 19:42
articles.author: RICE Editors
articles.description: A prototype field-note image testing place, caption, and evidence systems.
articles.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction; not an authenticated documentary photograph.

articles.title: Damp Heat Index
articles.author: RICE Editors
articles.description: A prototype copy-bed composition demonstrating a future archive treatment.
articles.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction; not an authenticated historical document.

articles.title: Mill Ledger, 1911
articles.description: Withdrawn synthetic ledger record retained only for audit history.
